FedData v3.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Download and crop the National Hydrography Dataset.

Source: R/NHD_FUNCTIONS.R
get_nhd.Rd

get_nhd returns a list of `sf` objects extracted from the National Hydrography Dataset.

get_nhd(
  template,
  label,
  nhdplus = FALSE,
  extraction.dir = paste0(tempdir(), "/FedData/"),
  force.redo = FALSE
)

Arguments

template

A `Raster*`, `Spatial*`, or `sf` object to serve as a template for cropping.
label

A character string naming the study area.
nhdplus

Extract data from the USGS NHDPlus High Resolution service (experimental)
extraction.dir

A character string indicating where the extracted and cropped NHD data should be put.
force.redo

If an extraction for this template and label already exists, should a new one be created?

Value

A list of `sf` collections extracted from the National Hydrography Dataset.

Examples

# Get the NHD (USA ONLY)
NHD <- get_nhd(
  template = FedData::meve,
  label = "meve"
)
NHD

#> $Point
#> Simple feature collection with 2 features and 9 fields
#> Geometry type: POINT
#> Dimension:     XY
#> Bounding box:  xmin: -108.5456 ymin: 37.21663 xmax: -108.3579 ymax: 37.2525
#> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84
#> # A tibble: 2 x 10
#>   OBJECTID         FDATE RESOLUTION GNIS_ID  GNIS_NAME    REACHCODE FTYPE FCODE
#>      <int>         <dbl>      <int> <chr>    <chr>        <chr>     <int> <int>
#> 1    15443 1057104000000          2 00179195 Rock Springs NA          458 45800
#> 2   409303 1425639399000          2 NA       NA           NA          367 36701
#> # … with 2 more variables: PERMANENT_IDENTIFIER <chr>, geom <POINT [°]>
#> 
#> $Flowline
#> Simple feature collection with 403 features and 16 fields
#> Geometry type: MULTILINESTRING
#> Dimension:     XY
#> Bounding box:  xmin: -108.5547 ymin: 37.15643 xmax: -108.3398 ymax: 37.34939
#> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84
#> # A tibble: 403 x 17
#>    OBJECTID PERMANENT_IDENTIF…      FDATE RESOLUTION GNIS_ID GNIS_NAME  LENGTHKM
#>       <int> <chr>                   <dbl>      <int> <chr>   <chr>         <dbl>
#>  1    84812 89636091              1.33e12          2 009022… Mancos Ri…    0.042
#>  2   150805 82523310              1.60e12          2 NA      NA            1.64 
#>  3   245760 89638649              1.33e12          2 NA      NA            0.859
#>  4   312326 82523368              1.33e12          2 NA      NA            3.79 
#>  5   407405 89635301              1.33e12          2 NA      NA            0.01 
#>  6   407407 89638491              1.33e12          2 NA      NA            0.762
#>  7   407411 89634469              1.33e12          2 NA      NA            0.6  
#>  8   473490 82531672              1.60e12          2 NA      NA            0.437
#>  9   568774 89634463              1.33e12          2 NA      NA            1.32 
#> 10   568793 89639153              1.44e12          2 009022… Mancos Ri…    0.955
#> # … with 393 more rows, and 10 more variables: REACHCODE <chr>, FLOWDIR <int>,
#> #   WBAREA_PERMANENT_IDENTIFIER <chr>, FTYPE <int>, FCODE <int>,
#> #   INNETWORK <int>, MAINPATH <int>, VISIBILITYFILTER <int>,
#> #   SHAPE_Length <dbl>, geom <MULTILINESTRING [°]>
#> 
#> $Line
#> Simple feature collection with 0 features and 11 fields
#> Bounding box:  xmin: NA ymin: NA xmax: NA ymax: NA
#> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84
#> # A tibble: 0 x 12
#> # … with 12 variables: OBJECTID <int>, PERMANENT_IDENTIFIER <chr>, FDATE <dbl>,
#> #   RESOLUTION <int>, GNIS_ID <chr>, GNIS_NAME <chr>, LENGTHKM <dbl>,
#> #   FTYPE <int>, FCODE <int>, VISIBILITYFILTER <chr>, SHAPE_Length <dbl>,
#> #   geom <GEOMETRY [°]>
#> 
#> $Area
#> Simple feature collection with 0 features and 13 fields
#> Bounding box:  xmin: NA ymin: NA xmax: NA ymax: NA
#> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84
#> # A tibble: 0 x 14
#> # … with 14 variables: OBJECTID <int>, PERMANENT_IDENTIFIER <chr>, FDATE <dbl>,
#> #   RESOLUTION <int>, GNIS_ID <chr>, GNIS_NAME <chr>, AREASQKM <dbl>,
#> #   ELEVATION <chr>, FTYPE <int>, FCODE <int>, VISIBILITYFILTER <chr>,
#> #   SHAPE_Length <dbl>, SHAPE_Area <dbl>, geom <GEOMETRY [°]>
#> 
#> $Waterbody
#> Simple feature collection with 10 features and 14 fields
#> Geometry type: POLYGON
#> Dimension:     XY
#> Bounding box:  xmin: -108.5327 ymin: 37.19095 xmax: -108.4021 ymax: 37.32777
#> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84
#> # A tibble: 10 x 15
#>    OBJECTID PERMANENT_IDENTIFI…      FDATE RESOLUTION GNIS_ID GNIS_NAME AREASQKM
#>       <int> <chr>                    <dbl>      <int> <chr>   <chr>        <dbl>
#>  1  1208837 89638655               1.06e12          2 NA      NA           0.001
#>  2  2219557 89634565               1.06e12          2 NA      NA           0.003
#>  3  2306761 89638207               1.06e12          2 NA      NA           0.001
#>  4  2635899 89634585               1.06e12          2 NA      NA           0.005
#>  5  3315584 89634605               1.06e12          2 NA      NA           0.001
#>  6  3951524 89634591               1.06e12          2 NA      NA           0.006
#>  7  4061330 89634587               1.06e12          2 NA      NA           0.006
#>  8  4390943 89638209               1.06e12          2 NA      NA           0.001
#>  9  4830298 89634583               1.06e12          2 NA      NA           0.005
#> 10  5378219 89634589               1.06e12          2 NA      NA           0.005
#> # … with 8 more variables: ELEVATION <chr>, REACHCODE <chr>, FTYPE <int>,
#> #   FCODE <int>, VISIBILITYFILTER <int>, SHAPE_Length <dbl>, SHAPE_Area <dbl>,
#> #   geom <POLYGON [°]>
#> 
NHD %>%
  plot_nhd(template = FedData::meve)
